name: Owinka Shooter 2
short_description: Owinka Shooter 2 throws you right back into the story of Owinka 427. Prepare to escape the Institute once and for all!
detailed_description:
Welcome to OWINKA SHOOTER 2.

In this hit masterpiece sequel to the hit masterpiece, you return as Owinka 427, two weeks after Sebinka's takeover of the Institute. With the renewed assistance of Jerrbot 2.0 and a hesitant deal with Owinka, it's time to take the Institute back, and earn your freedom!

Sebinka is no easy foe, as a new wave of bean shaped Anti-Gamer-Measures are fresh out the oven, ready to stop you at any cost. Sebinka's forces aren't the only issue however, as a new opponent begins to make his way into the fold.

In Owinka Shooter 2, you are reunited with your infinite ammo pistol, alongside some extra firepower as well. With expanded gameplay from the original, Owinka Shooter 2 is sure to keep you engaged through the campaign, also providing plenty of post-story content, such as a revamped Infinite-Wave-A-Tron, and Sandbox.
